meta.title: European-Style Windows | uPVC & Aluminum | DECA Windows
meta.description: Premium tilt & turn, uPVC, and aluminum windows manufactured in Massachusetts. Industry-leading U-values, sound insulation, and security. Factory-direct pricing.

hero.heading: DECA Windows
hero.subheading: European engineering, manufactured in Massachusetts. Our windows deliver industry-leading thermal performance (U-value 0.10), exceptional noise reduction (45-50 dB), and multi-point security — all with factory-direct pricing and a 15-year warranty.

subcategories.label: Tilt & Turn Windows
subcategories.desc: Two opening modes for ventilation, cleaning, and security.

subcategories.label: Aluminum Windows
subcategories.desc: Slim profiles, maximum glass area, contemporary aesthetics.

hero.imageAlt: DECA window collection — GEALAN-LINEAR windows installed in modern home

profileSystems.title: GEALAN Profile Systems
profileSystems.subtitle: We build with GEALAN — one of Europe's leading uPVC profile manufacturers with 50+ years of innovation.

systems.title: GEALAN-LINEAR
systems.description: Modern angular design with aluminum-like aesthetics. 3-level sealing, narrow visible widths for maximum glass area.

systems.title: GEALAN S 8000
systems.description: Classic 5–6 chamber system with 3″ installation depth. Large main chamber for steel stiffeners, elements up to 80″.

surfaceTechnology.title: GEALAN-acrylcolor Surface Technology
surfaceTechnology.description: Co-extruded acrylic surface (since 1980) — scratch-resistant, weather-resistant, lightfast, and dirt-resistant. Available in Matte, Smooth, Grained, and RealWood finishes. Over 40 standard colors + 200 RAL custom options.

components.title: Multi-Point Locks
components.desc: Up to 12 locking points for maximum security

components.title: 3-Level Sealing
components.desc: EPDM triple sealing for air & water tightness

components.title: Glass Packages
components.desc: Double and triple glazing, IGU up to 2.0″

windowTypes.title: Window Types
windowTypes.subtitle: Available in uPVC and aluminum. All types support tilt & turn functionality.

colors.title: Colors That Complement Your Style
colors.subtitle: Choose from over 40 standard colors and 200+ RAL custom options for both interior and exterior finishes.
colors.note: Wood-grain laminate finishes also available. Contact us for samples

items.q: What is the difference between uPVC and aluminum windows?
items.a: uPVC windows offer superior thermal insulation and are more affordable. Aluminum windows provide slimmer profiles, larger glass areas, and a more modern aesthetic. Both are available in tilt & turn configuration with the same glazing and hardware options.

items.q: Can I get custom sizes and configurations?
items.a: Yes. Every DECA window is made to order. We can accommodate virtually any size, shape, or configuration — including arched tops, angled shapes, and multi-unit combinations.

items.q: How do tilt & turn windows open?
items.a: Tilt & turn windows have two modes controlled by a single handle. Turn the handle 90° to tilt the sash inward from the top for ventilation. Turn it 180° to swing the entire sash inward like a door for full opening and easy cleaning.
We offer double-glazed (U-value 0.25), triple-glazed (U-value 0.10-0.13), and laminated safety glass. All units come with argon fill, Low-E coating, and warm-edge spacer bars as standard.
